title: Judgment Deferred
writer: Herbert Ayres, Barbara K. Emary, Walter Meade
actors: Hugh Sinclair, Helen Shingler, Abraham Sofaer
plot: A group of very strange men, refugees and casualties of the war, rally round when one of their number is framed by a drug racketeer. Co-opting a well-known journalist to their cause, they scheme to bring the racketeer to justice i...
